Chapter: Contribution Entry Process.
Current document status: Needs Finance Review.

Section: Contribution Entry Process.

Section: Purpose.

Document how contributions are entered, reviewed, corrected, and reported.

Section: Steps.

Receive count sheets and deposit records.
Enter contributions into the approved system.
Confirm totals match deposit records.
Resolve discrepancies.
Maintain donor confidentiality.
Prepare contribution reports as authorized.

End of chapter: Contribution Entry Process.
